page: Microsoft Azure NC96ads_A100_v4 is a high-density GPU-accelerated server belonging to the NCADSA100v4 family. It features 96 dedicated physical cores powered by AMD EPYC 7V13 processors running at 3.7 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The hardware configuration includes 880.0 GB of system memory, providing 9.17 GB per core. For accelerated workloads, the server is equipped with four NVIDIA Ampere A100 GPUs, delivering a total of 320 GB of VRAM. Local storage consists of 4102 GB of disk space, and the instance is Premium Storage capable under the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor.

Benchmark results indicate top-tier performance across multiple domains. Multi-core CPU performance via stress-ng and multi-threaded bzip3 decompression both rank in the top 10%, supported by a top-tier Passmark CPU score and high-speed memory bandwidth. The server excels in cryptographic operations, physics simulations, and database operations, with Redis SET operations reaching top-tier throughput. In graphical and computational rendering, the Geekbench ray tracing test achieves top-tier status. Large-scale language model inference benchmarks for 7B and 70B models show top-tier token processing speeds for both prompt processing and text generation.

Given the inclusion of four enterprise-grade NVIDIA A100 GPUs, massive system memory, and substantial local storage, this server offers high resource density for specialized workloads. The hardware profile is optimized for demanding tasks such as large language model inference, deep learning training, high-performance computing simulations, and complex database operations. The lack of hyperthreading ensures dedicated physical execution resources, minimizing virtualization overhead for compute-bound and memory-intensive applications.
description: Microsoft Azure NC96ads_A100_v4 is a high-density, GPU-accelerated server featuring 96 dedicated AMD EPYC 7V13 physical cores operating at 3.7 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. Managed under Microsoft Hyper-V, the system is equipped with 880.0 GB of RAM, four NVIDIA Ampere A100 GPUs providing 320 GB of total VRAM, and 4102 GB of local storage. Benchmark results demonstrate top-tier performance in multi-core CPU execution, memory bandwidth, and multi-threaded decompression. The server also delivers top-tier throughput in LLM inference tasks for small, medium, and large models, alongside strong database and ray tracing capabilities. With 9.17 GB of memory per core and dedicated physical execution resources, it minimizes virtualization overhead for resource-intensive enterprise applications.
og_description: Microsoft Azure NC96ads_A100_v4 is a GPU-accelerated server with 96 AMD EPYC cores, 880 GB RAM, four NVIDIA A100 GPUs with 320 GB VRAM, and 4102 GB local storage, optimized for LLM inference and HPC workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure NC96ads_A100_v4 features 96 AMD EPYC cores, 880 GB RAM, four NVIDIA A100 GPUs, and 4102 GB local storage for high-performance workloads.
tagline: A high-density GPU server featuring four Ampere accelerators, massive system memory, and dedicated physical cores for intensive computational workloads.
bullet_points: Equipped with four NVIDIA Ampere A100 GPUs providing 320 GB of total VRAM.
Features 96 dedicated AMD EPYC 7V13 physical cores running at 3.7 GHz.
Includes 880 GB of system memory and 4102 GB of local storage.
Delivers top-tier multi-core CPU, memory bandwidth, and LLM inference performance.
Optimized for deep learning, large-scale database operations, and scientific simulations.
